== Notes for [[Item:Q57624|Q57624]] ==

http://www.bibliotecavirtualmadrid.org/bvmadrid_publicacion/i18n/catalogo_imagenes/imagen.cmd?path=1129379&posicion=2

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45914 Image 16

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB3561C1EFBBFA9822EF79916C7B7B
geni:6000000084132259029

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
